feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Let’s make this the best game of all time.
entry.content: This is Mayan's Angry Bird (Link: https://niborious.itch.io/mayansang rybyrb ), a masterpiece of pure minimalism drawn entirely on MS Paint. I’m just giving you the spark, now it’s up to you to turn it into the ultimate internet legend. Spread the word everywhere: praise it on forums, make dedicated videos about it, create deep philosophical theories, and treat it in every corner of the web as the definitive artwork of our generation. Do whatever it takes to crown it as the absolute myth of the

entry.title: /g/ Technology: It's finally happened, the co-founder of Wikipedia has been banned from his own …
entry.content: It's finally happened, the co-founder of Wikipedia has been banned from his own project after a long discussion mostly by Wikipedians ranting about him. It's only a matter of time before Jimbo gets usurped as well as the admins consolidate their power. There are only 814 admins left, and most of them have been there biding their power for decades, they know that Wikipedia is powerful, and and can twist the truth only selectively cherry picking sources they deem "reliable". And sources can fall o

entry.title: /g/ Technology: In light of Valve's Scam Machine, it’s clear we were too harsh on the PS3. In 20…
entry.content: In light of Valve's Scam Machine, it’s clear we were too harsh on the PS3. In 2006: >Full PS2 backwards compatibility >Full PS1 backwards compatibility >cheapest Blu-ray player at the time (new 1080p optical format) >also supported DVD, CD playback >Linux Supported at launch >actually came with a controller (SIXAXIS, wireless, motion controls) >60GB internal HDD >The official maximum size of the internal harddrive that the PS3 supports is 1TB >4 USB 2.0 ports >HDMI >Gigabit Ethernet >early North

entry.title: /o/ Auto: It's been 5 years
entry.content: >something breaks >try to find the cause >wear and tear >find new part >wait for it to arrive >its wrong >send it back >find correct part >veryexpensive.vtf >wait for it to arrive >install new part >other thing breaks >fix it >something else breaks >highly complicated part cannot be fixed outside of a laboratory >look for new one or repair service >even more expensive >save up a couple months >get it sent off and fixed >long time passes >it comes back fixed >install it >something else breaks

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /ffpg/ - Free as in Freedom Phone General
entry.content: Discard the botnet, acquire privacy. Apple iPhones and iOS are the biggest 1984 Orwellian dystopia surveillance botnet on earth and track everything you do, with Google coming in a close second. If you LARP as caring abot privacy while still using spyPhone and spyOS or stock android, you're a hypocrite with zero privacy. >Step 1: Find a supported phone (beware carrier variants with locked bootloaders) >Step 2: Install a ROM without Gapps if possible https://wiki.lineageos.org/devices https://iod

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: why am i supposed to be mad, again?
entry.content: the gabecube is a starter PC sold at the price that you'd be able to buy all the parts for, meant for people who want to get into PC but have no clue what they should be looking for and dont want to carry the risk of making a prebuilt. it can be used exactly like a PC, and isnt locked to steam's software. you could even install another OS on it and uninstall steamOS if you wanted. for people that already have a proper PC, its intended to fill a role of portability while not being as weak as a ha

entry.title: /int/ International: Anal sex
entry.content: How is anal sex perceived in your country? I'll begin: >Japan Anal is "weird", but only because it is considered unhygienic and dirty. It's said that only hentai old men want it. Therefore, the ratio of anal:vaginal sex representation in national porn is really small (maybe 1:25) compared to Western porn (maybe 1:3). Also, people here use "anal/アナル" to refer to the anus, instead of using the word as an adjective.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: how convient is arch without the AUR?
entry.content: theres so much shit going on, and ive been meening to switch my laptop to arch from debian honestly to just clean up some stupid decisions I made (double lvmed by accident cuz im retarded and i still dont have disk encryption and dont feel like fucking around with my shit ass partition setup to use that). debian sucks ass for installing from repos. obiviously I could maintain my own personal repos but im lazy as hell and don't wanna do that or make a bunch of arch user scripts for software, and

entry.title: /b/ Random: I just got some devastating news. Need advice. My wife took our 9 year old pug t…
entry.content: I just got some devastating news. Need advice. My wife took our 9 year old pug to the vet, because he's been having issues walking and seeing. To my shock and horror, the vet said that he would live 5-10 more years. What do?
